Belén Vázquez

From Buenos Aires. Lived and worked in Berlin and Barcelona, now based in Madrid. I work at the intersection of product systems, brand, and strategy — building the layer between what a product does and how it makes people feel. Currently at Wallapop, previously OLX Group.

About

Originally from Buenos Aires — I've spent the last decade living and working across Berlin, Barcelona, and now Madrid. I'm a Staff Product Designer with 8+ years of experience building digital products at scale, currently at Wallapop and previously at OLX Group. My work lives at the intersection of product strategy, systems design, and brand expression.

I care about the layer between function and feeling: how a product communicates, what it signals, and how it earns trust over time. I'm known for driving org-wide alignment through frameworks and systems at scale — and I go deep into execution when it matters, to prove a point or show what good actually looks like.

Currently

Wallapop, Madrid
